name: Singleton
description: Ensure a class has only one instance and provide a global point of access to it.
problem: Need to ensure that only one instance of a class exists throughout the application.
solution: Make the class constructor private and provide a static method that returns the same instance.
when_to_use: When exactly one instance of a class is needed
When the single instance should be accessible from a well-known access point
When the sole instance should be extensible by subclassing
when_not_to_use: When you need to pass state to the object
When testing is a priority (hard to mock)
When you might need multiple instances later

participants.name: Singleton
participants.role: Defines getInstance() operation for clients to access unique instance
